name: Leadership and Governance
description: Effective leadership and governance ensure long-term success for your open source project.
author: GitHub
learningObjectives:
After this lesson, the learner should be able to:
- Design transparent governance structures for open source projects
- Evaluate different leadership models and their applicability to various project contexts
- Create project policies that support long-term sustainability and community growth
- Demonstrate effective decision-making processes in open source communities
- Assess the impact of governance choices on project health and contributor satisfaction
abstract: This guide outlines effective leadership and governance models for open source projects, emphasizing the importance of transparency, decision-making processes, and creating a structure that supports long-term project sustainability.
accessibilitySummary: These guides are available in over 20 languages, helping global communities learn and lead in open source.
mentions: These guides are available in over 20 languages.
teaches: Design transparent governance frameworks and sustainable leadership models for open source communities.
